name: errors-ingest-bad-platform
_note: Public. Deterministic validation rejection: an unknown platform yields 400 {error:"platform must be one of: ios, android, macos, windows, linux, web", code:"invalid-input", request_id:<uuid>}. The per-request request_id is a fresh UUID so it's ignored; error + code are byte-stable. No DB/secret access on this path (runs before the honeypot drop and before any insert), so no shadow-DB prerequisite.
